visa_types.name: Seminar or Conference
visa_types.documents_required:
Document Checklist (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/7qJQsHOUiIN3rSRcHPjZBO/0136fb6d0a00d64f04c5e35c13b30905/Seminar-or-Conference-Visa-Checklist.pdf)
Note: Kindly arrange the documents in the same order as outlined in Document Checklist and attach a copy of it along with your visa application form. Please note that Visa Application
                              Form must be filled in CAPITAL letters only. Please print the visa application form on 3 separate sheets of paper and do not print back to back.
Important-Please note all photocopies should be on A4 size only
Important - Color passport Bio pages photocopy
visa_types.visa_fees:
You must pay the applicable Visa fee and Service fee when submitting your application. 

[Table:  Mar > ind > en > Journalist > fess]

- All Applicants are requested to submit the Visa Fee, VFS charges and tourism promotional Charges at VFS by Cash/Card.
- VFS will also accept the Service Fee of INR590 per applicant and Other Charges Pertaining to value added Services (Inclusive of all taxes)
- Mandatory Tourism Promotional Charges of INR140 per applicant needs to be paid at the time of submission.

Please note: Visa Fee amount will be considered as applicable on the date of receiving of passport from the Embassy. In case the visa fee gets revised post submission and prior processing of application the revised fee will be applicable, in such scenario applicant has to pay the differential amount.
visa_types.processing_time:
It takes usually minimum five (05) working days excluding the date of submission. In addition there are some cases which may take longer processing period depending on the individual
                              circumstances. 
Please note that this is an indicative processing time only. Processing time may increase or decrease at the discretion of the Embassy of Kingdom of Morocco; New Delhi
VFS Global is involved only in non-judgmental task of visa processing and does not play any role in processing the visa application as this is entirely the prerogative of the Embassy
                              of Kingdom of Morocco ;New Delhi
visa_types.forms:
Please submit one completed and signed Visa Application form along with your application
Visa Application Form (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/3w9uf6uZJnVBdZUXz7GI7m/d941a999d9bd9fb41f83f489f414e71b/visa-form.pdf)
visa_types.overview:
Overview
This visa allows people to visit Morocco for seminar or conference purpose.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This visa allows people to visit Morocco for seminar or conference purpose.

## Visa Fees
You must pay the applicable Visa fee and Service fee when submitting your application. 

[Table:  Mar > ind > en > Journalist > fess]

- All Applicants are requested to submit the Visa Fee, VFS charges and tourism promotional Charges at VFS by Cash/Card.
- VFS will also accept the Service Fee of INR590 per applicant and Other Charges Pertaining to value added Services (Inclusive of all taxes)
- Mandatory Tourism Promotional Charges of INR140 per applicant needs to be paid at the time of submission.

Please note: Visa Fee amount will be considered as applicable on the date of receiving of passport from the Embassy. In case the visa fee gets revised post submission and prior processing of application the revised fee will be applicable, in such scenario applicant has to pay the differential amount. 

## Documents Required
Document Checklist (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/7qJQsHOUiIN3rSRcHPjZBO/0136fb6d0a00d64f04c5e35c13b30905/Seminar-or-Conference-Visa-Checklist.pdf)
Note: Kindly arrange the documents in the same order as outlined in Document Checklist and attach a copy of it along with your visa application form. Please note that Visa Application
                              Form must be filled in CAPITAL letters only. Please print the visa application form on 3 separate sheets of paper and do not print back to back.
Important-Please note all photocopies should be on A4 size only
Important - Color passport Bio pages photocopy

## Photo Specifications
Please submit two photograph along with your visa application. The photograph must be:
- Not more than 6 months old
- 4 X 3 cm showing clearly the facial features
- Colored, with plain white background
- Taken looking straight forward and face seen clearly
- On a good quality paper
- 80% face coverage without borders

## Processing Time
It takes usually minimum five (05) working days excluding the date of submission. In addition there are some cases which may take longer processing period depending on the individual
                              circumstances. 
Please note that this is an indicative processing time only. Processing time may increase or decrease at the discretion of the Embassy of Kingdom of Morocco; New Delhi
VFS Global is involved only in non-judgmental task of visa processing and does not play any role in processing the visa application as this is entirely the prerogative of the Embassy
                              of Kingdom of Morocco ;New Delhi

## Download Forms
Please submit one completed and signed Visa Application form along with your application
Visa Application Form (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/3w9uf6uZJnVBdZUXz7GI7m/d941a999d9bd9fb41f83f489f414e71b/visa-form.pdf)

visa_types.visa_fees:
You must pay the applicable Visa fee and Service fee when submitting your application. 

[Table:  Mar > ind > en > Business > fess]

- All Applicants are requested to submit the Visa Fee, VFS charges and tourism promotional Charges at VFS by Cash/Card.
- VFS will also accept the Service Fee of INR590 per applicant and Other Charges Pertaining to value added Services (Inclusive of all taxes)
- Mandatory Tourism Promotional Charges of INR140 per applicant needs to be paid at the time of submission.

Please note: Visa Fee amount will be considered as applicable on the date of receiving of passport from the Embassy. In case the visa fee gets revised post submission and prior processing of application the revised fee will be applicable, in such scenario applicant has to pay the differential amount.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
This visa allows people to visit Morocco for Visitor purpose.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This visa allows people to visit Morocco for Visitor purpose.

## Visa Fees
You must pay the applicable Visa fee and Service fee when submitting your application. 

[Table:  Mar > ind > en > Business > fess]

- All Applicants are requested to submit the Visa Fee, VFS charges and tourism promotional Charges at VFS by Cash/Card.
- VFS will also accept the Service Fee of INR590 per applicant and Other Charges Pertaining to value added Services (Inclusive of all taxes)
- Mandatory Tourism Promotional Charges of INR140 per applicant needs to be paid at the time of submission.

Please note: Visa Fee amount will be considered as applicable on the date of receiving of passport from the Embassy. In case the visa fee gets revised post submission and prior processing of application the revised fee will be applicable, in such scenario applicant has to pay the differential amount.

## Documents Required
Document Checklist (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/3kFNHmMov0jxW8CEHNBeC6/2dbd11deb61e5fcd03cf16e725aea42f/Visitor-Checklist.pdf)
Note: Kindly arrange the documents in the same order as outlined in Document Checklist and attach a copy of it along with your visa application form. Please note that Visa Application
                              Form must be filled in CAPITAL letters only. Please print the visa application form on 3 separate sheets of paper and do not print back to back.
Important-Please note all photocopies should be on A4 size only
Important - Color passport Bio pages photocopy

## Photo Specifications
Please submit two photograph along with your visa application. The photograph must be:
- Not more than 6 months old
- 4 X 3 cm showing clearly the facial features
- Colored, with plain white background
- Taken looking straight forward and face seen clearly
- On a good quality paper
- 80% face coverage without borders

## Processing Time
It takes usually minimum five (05) working days excluding the date of submission. In addition there are some cases which may take longer processing period depending on the individual
                              circumstances. 
Please note that this is an indicative processing time only. Processing time may increase or decrease at the discretion of the Embassy of Kingdom of Morocco; New Delhi
VFS Global is involved only in non-judgmental task of visa processing and does not play any role in processing the visa application as this is entirely the prerogative of the Embassy
                              of Kingdom of Morocco ;New Delhi

## Download Forms
Please submit one completed and signed Visa Application form along with your application
Visa Application Form (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/3w9uf6uZJnVBdZUXz7GI7m/d941a999d9bd9fb41f83f489f414e71b/visa-form.pdf)
